titleStmt.title: SII 26.739: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 739. (A.R. No. 688 of 1909.) TIRUNEḌUṄGAḶAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: In the same place as above.

This inscription records a sale of land using the money derived from a certain fine amount (daṇḍakkāṉam), as kuḍinīṅgā-dēvadāna, by the sabhai, the ūr and the dēvakanmis, of Tiruneḍuṅgaḷam, to a certain Araiyaṉ Chaturaviḍaṅgaṉ of Puttāmūr. It is stated that this person should provide, from the year opposite to the opposite of the 8th year, sweet drink made of a variety of pulse (payaṟu) during the morning service daily to the god Mahādēvar of the place, and that he had agreed to measure out annually 120 kalam of paddy for the purpose. It is stated at the end that the sale of land was in lieu (pratigraha) of the daṇḍakkāṇam amount received from the person.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . korājarājakesariparmaṟku yāṇṭu 8 Āvatu tiru
neṭuṅkaḷattu sabhaiyomum Ūromum devakanmikaḷomum put
tāmuruṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ caturaviṭaṅkaṉukku kuṭinikkāt tevatāṉamāka viṟṟukkuṭutta
nilattukku kiḻpāṟkkellai māṅkāṉal muṉ kuḷattiṉ melaip peruvaḻiyi
ṉ melaiyūruṇi ṉirkko korutteṉ vaṭal coma kkotattukku meṟkku teṉ
pāṟkellai māṅkāṉalār puṉce nattatiṉ vaṭakaruvukku mitaṉ melai kucakkuḻiyiṉ teṉkarai kkotta meṟku
nokki nampaṉ kuḷattu vaṭakaṭai kkettukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai vikramāparaṇanallūr varam
paṟai nilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai teṉṉāṟṟiṉiṉṟu vāṉavaṉ peraiyar kuḷattukkup
pān=ta vākkāṉ karaikku mikkuḷattiṉ teṉkarai mateṟkum Iññaṭuvupaṭṭa nilam moḻiviṉṟiye
yucarppiliyu carkkavuṅ kuḻippilik kuḻikkavum peruvatākavum Innilattukku Iṟaivāṭākkaṭaṉ Ivvā
ṇṭiṉetirāmāṇṭi ṉetirāmāṇṭu mutal Immahādevarkkuc ciṟukālai payaṟṟup poṉakam nica
ti tūṇi nellu ner Amutu ceyyac cantrādittaval Āṇṭuvarai Aḷappatāṉa I 100 2 10 kalam (1/2) I nūṟṟi
rupatiṉ kalamum Ūṟkkāl kotukulavaṉālaḷappatākavum Iññilattukku nir nālu nāḷiloru nāḷ ki
ḷḷivayalukkut teṉṉāṟṟiṉṉiṉṟu pānta vākkāluṅ kumiḻiyu nirkkintavar pāyappeṟuvatā
kavum Iññilam viṟṟukkuṭuttuk koṇṭa vilaipporuḷ tevarkaḷ cotiṉaikkaḷattiṉiṉṟu va
n=ta taṇṭakkāṇattukku mutal koṇṭu viṟṟukkuṭuttom Araiyaṉ caturaviṭaṅkaṉukku Ivvaṉaivo
m vilaiyoṟṟi pratigrahattukkurittāka viṟṟukkuṭuttom Emmilicain=ta vilaipporuḷukku śrīmāhe
śvararakṣai .§
Digital edition of SII 26.739 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
